conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Mattress shopping -- comparing Purple, Casper, and Saatva based on reviews so far.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My favorite coffee shop is testing a new seasonal drink.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Purple's reviews mention it sleeping cooler than most foam mattresses, which is appealing.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to call the insurance company about a claim this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Casper is the most well-known of the three but a few reviews mentioned it sagging after a couple years.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got a reminder that my credit card statement is due soon.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to return a library book before it's overdue.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I switched my podcast subscription to a cheaper plan.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Saatva's trial window is a lot more generous than the other two, and reviews mention it staying cooler overnight than my current mattress.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Returned the library book just in time.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to schedule a haircut, it's overdue at this point.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Ordered a sample of Saatva's foam layers and it did feel noticeably cooler than what I currently sleep on.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My phone's storage is almost full again, need to clear out old photos.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Purple is still tempting just for the cooling factor alone.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My gym schedule changed again this week because of a instructor swap.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Compared the trial periods again and Saatva's is significantly longer than both Purple's and Casper's.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Going with Saatva. The longer trial period and not sleeping hot like my current mattress made it the pick over Purple and Casper.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: It should arrive sometime next week.
